infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Paradise Delivery needs your location to track deliveries and show available jobs nearby.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Paradise Delivery needs your location in the background to track deliveries even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Paradise Delivery needs camera access to take photos of orders at pickup and delivery for verification.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Paradise Delivery to access your camera to take photos of orders.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Paradise Delivery to use your location for delivery tracking.
